gauge.name: Wateree River at Lake Wateree Dam

impacts.statement: Roads and homes nearest the lake shore flood. Flooded roads isolate areas extending from the lake shore.
Home owners on low lying property have to move belongings out of basements or from under raised houses. Boat launch on U.S. Highway 1 at the lake closed due to flood water.
Roadways near Beaver Creek become flooded.
Several yards and docks in low lying areas around Lake Wateree begin to flood.
The piers on the Wildlife Road bridge over Singleton Creek become submerged.

hydronotes.statement: Gauge reading affected by reservoir operations.
River forecasts for this location take into account past precipitation and the precipitation amounts expected approximately 48 hours into the future from the forecast issuance time.

gauge.forecastReliability: Forecasts are issued as needed during times of high water, but are not routinely available.
